nasb.text: Now Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters; but his brothers did not have many sons, nor did all their family multiply like the sons of Judah.

esv.text: Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters; but his brothers did not have many children, nor did all their clan multiply like the men of Judah.

cnv.text: 示每有十六個兒子，六個女兒；他兄弟們的兒女卻不多；他們各家的兒女，都不如猶大族的子孫那樣多。

ccb.text: 示每有十六个儿子和六个女儿，他弟兄的儿女不多。他们整个宗族的人不如犹大宗族的人多。
